items.prompt: evaluates bounded expressions correctly by substitution
items.expected_evidence: substitute values into expressions and compute accurately
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner evaluates the expression correctly by substitution.

items.prompt: distinguishes expressions from equations and explains the difference in meaning
items.expected_evidence: sort expressions and equations by structure and purpose
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the difference between an expression and an equation.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to substitution_placeholding_error.
items.expected_evidence: substitute values into expressions and compute accurately
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the substitution mistake and preserves the original structure.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, verbal, and simple contextual representations
items.expected_evidence: connect a verbal rule or quantity description to an algebraic expression in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner connects a verbal or contextual description to the correct algebraic expression.
